name: Aether Bio
description: AI-powered drug discovery platform that uses deep learning to identify novel protein targets for rare diseases. The platform has screened over 2 million compounds and partnered with 3 top-10 pharma companies.

name: CarbonTrace
description: Industrial IoT platform that monitors and reduces Scope 1 and 2 emissions in real time across manufacturing facilities. Deployed in 40 factories, saving clients an average of 18% on carbon credits annually.

name: LegalMind
description: NLP platform that automates contract review and clause extraction for mid-market law firms. Reduces contract review time by 70%. Currently used by 120 law firms processing 5000 contracts per month.

name: FleetOps AI
description: Computer vision system for predictive maintenance in commercial trucking fleets. Analyzes dashcam footage to flag mechanical issues before breakdown. 94% accuracy on brake wear prediction.

name: QuantumVault
description: Post-quantum cryptography infrastructure for financial institutions. Helps banks future-proof encryption against quantum computing attacks. Signed LOIs with 2 tier-1 banks.

name: EduPath
description: Adaptive learning platform for K-12 STEM education. Uses reinforcement learning to personalize curriculum paths. 200 schools, 45000 students, 31% improvement in standardized test scores.

name: FarmSense
description: Precision agriculture platform combining satellite imagery and soil sensors to optimize irrigation and fertilizer application. Reduces water usage by 35% across 80000 acres under management.

name: MediChain
description: Blockchain-based patient health record interoperability platform. HIPAA compliant. Integrated with 14 EHR systems. 3 hospital networks live, 250000 patient records.

name: NovaBuild
description: Construction project management software using generative AI to predict cost overruns and schedule delays. Beta clients report 22% reduction in project delays.

name: ClearPay
description: B2B embedded finance platform that offers invoice factoring and working capital loans to SMBs via API integration with accounting software. $40M in loans originated.

name: Synapse ML
description: MLOps platform for financial services firms to deploy, monitor and retrain models with built-in regulatory compliance audit trails. 8 hedge fund clients.

name: TerraWatt
description: Grid-scale battery storage optimization software. Uses reinforcement learning to maximize revenue from energy arbitrage in deregulated markets. 3 utility clients, 2.1 GWh under management.

name: Cura Health
description: Remote patient monitoring platform for chronic disease management. FDA-cleared devices paired with AI coaching. 12000 enrolled patients, 28% reduction in hospital readmissions.

name: ByteFreight
description: AI-powered freight brokerage matching shippers with carriers in real time. Eliminates empty miles. 15% lower rates than traditional brokers. $120M GMV.

name: NestNest
description: AI home valuation and iBuying platform for secondary markets in the Midwest. Uses computer vision on listing photos plus 200 market signals. 340 homes transacted.
